rulings.Case Title: ANEESH GUPTA VS. BESS DAUBENMIRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Aneesh Gupta For Entry Of Judgment Against Defendant Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; Request For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Lawrence Choy
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF ANEESH GUPTA's Motion Of Plaintiff Aneesh Gupta For Entry Of Judgment Against Defendant Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; Request For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Lawrence Choy Plaintiff's Motion for Entry of Judgment is GRANTED. Plaintiff to prepare the Order setting aside the Dismissal. Plaintiff to prepare Order for Entry of Judgment. Parties to file a stipulation for the Court to retain jurisdiction pursuant to CCP § 664.6 prior to any dismissal. Plaintiff's request for Attorneys fees is DENIED. Stipulation for Entry of Judgment provides for costs and fees associated with collection of the monies due. The Settlement Agreement provides each party will bear his/her own costs, expenses, and attorneys' fees . . . incurred in, or arising out of, or in any way connected with the circumstances and disputes which are the subject of this agreement. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: EVELYN CASTELLANOS ET AL VS. KIM HONG ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2019 line 6. CROSS COMPLAINANT LANDLEASE (US) CONSTRUCTION INC.'s MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File Amended Cross Complaint CONTINUED to May 10, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HOSTINGXTREME VENTURES, LLC. VS. EDMUND CHU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice And Motion For Summary Judgment By Defendants; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Separate Statement Of Undisputed Facts, Supporting Declarations And Request For Judicial Notice.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANTs EDMUND CHU, PETER CHIN, SUSAN LAI, and TAIA CHIN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to whether there was a breach of contract. Plaintiff's objection for lack of foundation as to Mr. Collin's declaration is sustained. Defendants' hearsay objection as to Plaintiff's statement regarding his conversation with the Rent Board is sustained. Prevailing parties to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY MASSIALAS VS. ALEXANDER LAWAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Casue Re: Contempt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2019 line 9. Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN F. LEE VS. DANIEL EVERETT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT DANIEL EVERETT's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Moving Party has not sustained his burden to show that the unlawful detainer action arises out of protected activity. Even if he had, Plaintiff has introduced sufficient evidence demonstrating he is likely to prevail on the merits. = (501/CFH)
